PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Shaun Carberry for David Schuster. Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

The Court informed Mr. Carberry that a current certified copy of the letters was needed. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.
